title: ValorCraft A Fantasy RPG Modpack
description: The Dark Fantasy RPG SMP modpack used in the ValorCraft Twitch series!
body:
Dark Fantasy RPG SMP Modpack

Designed for content creators and adventure enthusiasts, this medium-sized modpack immerses players in a captivating dark fantasy universe. Perfect for building a rich RPG SMP series, it enables you to bring your fantasy stories to life with a curated selection of mods that enhance exploration, storytelling, and immersive gameplay.

This modpack is the first in a series of interconnected packs, all seamlessly integrated with our dedicated RPG SMP server setup. Whether you're creating videos, streams, or simply exploring a dark fantasy realm, this pack provides the tools to elevate your content and craft unforgettable experiences.

Join our community and stay updated—visit our Discord for more information and support.

===========================================================================

Here is a list of honorable Mod menstions you can expect to see in this pack 

**Biomes We've Gone** 
This mod adds incredible terrain and world generation structures to create an immersive fantasy atmosphere in your world.

![Bioms We've Gone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653613e7621d707a2f23c5182dbc616a2b93d68a.jpeg)

TerraLith
Similar to Biomes We've Gone, this mod introduces stunning new biomes into world generation, ensuring that every direction offers a fresh and exciting adventure.
![Terralith](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78c1e8c5229c31cd6091520019b9ef179def7d86.png)

**Jaden's Nether Expansion**
This exciting mod introduces a fresh and wild new take on the Nether, featuring new biomes and terrain to enhance your storytelling and RPG experiences within your world.
![Jadens Neather Xxspanstion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/519cbd173e1eed66274de15cff43893591cd07a8.png)


Join our community and follow along to see how the content creators of ValorCraft RPG SMP use the modpack.
[Discord](https://discord.gg/TqK5GK5B)
